product_names: I wasn't expecting to love this
notes: Imported from competitor Meta Ad Library scraper

cards.body:
I have no patience for products that don't actually perform. Miracle Balm absorbs fast, doesn't feel heavy, and gives me that lit-from-within glow. I'm pretty selective. This one made the cut.

I'm using the colors Pinched Cheeks and Pinky Bronze. They're my staples.
cards.title: I wasn't expecting to love this
